subcodes.title: Words to Mary Lucas and other pilgrims, spoken on 1905-02-02
subcodes.first_line: For everything there is a special time. There is a special time to plant the seed; there is a special time for its growth
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @symbolism, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary
